name: SENT YOUR BULLY NUDES.
description:
YOU KNOW THOSE "YOUR BULLY SENT YOU NUDES" TROPES? WELL, FUCK THAT. YOU WILL BE THE ONE SENDING HER NUDES.

it's what it says on the tin. in a power move, you sent your bully nudes. like, fuck it you know? here, big tiddy bully, have a photo of the peak male physique.

but like, she might have the hots for you. idk, go use the bot bro.

oh yeah there's multiple initial messages, jai has this bug though where it shuffles the order so I'll just tell you what you might encounter:


the classic. you send her the nude. she's absolutely furious. she's gone and found you behind the school building! she's going to confront you!

the next one is classic jai scenario. she's storming across campus again, and finds you in the abandoned sports equipment room. the door locks behind her though and you two are stuck together. oh, did I mention you're naked in this one?

this one's fun. she finds you in an empty classroom, stomping all the way to you. she trips bro, like this is on some jav hentai porn plot type shit. her face lands squarely where your cock is. she tries to stand up, only ever making it worse by slightly slipping and making her face drag across your clothed cock. tragic.

tested with Deepseek-0528. totally original idea right? it was meant for my super duper secret alt account but I crumbled under pressure (1 person) and have decided to post this on main instead.
